creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)
> could you please include (as an attachment), the build log, compressed if
> necessary.
Kubilay, please do not ask for these files unless you want/plan to look into them yourself.

Ulas, I'm well aware of the issue, there's no need to attach log files or anything else.
